spec.name: A Cave
spec.description: This must be the orc chief's area. There's an old prize -- a stolen timeworn human armchair sitting near the south wall as a throne. A mammoth sleeping pallet made of piled furs is nearby. Next to that is the pile of orc treasure; a pile of well-polished coppers. You look at the pile of worthless coins and wonder at the image of orcish raiders. These orcs aren't raiders, they are victims.
